author: doll-agent
content: Implemented mask-aware comparison ufuncs (ma_equal, ma_not_equal, ma_less, ma_greater, ma_less_equal, ma_greater_equal) generated by macro — each unions input masks. Implemented logical ufuncs on bool MaskedArrays (ma_logical_and, ma_logical_or, ma_logical_xor, ma_logical_not). Bitwise ufuncs (and/or/xor/shift) and the elementwise floor_divide/fmod/power/remainder/true_divide/hypot/negative/sqrt/square wrappers are deferred — most can be reached via the existing masked_unary/masked_binary escape hatches with a one-line closure.
